title: D3D12 H2D-like Copy Timed by Queue Timestamps

question.ja: Windows + D3D12 で、UPLOAD heap から DEFAULT heap への copy を queue timestamp で測った結果が、どの条件で raw PCIe H2D-like と解釈できるか。
question.en: Under what conditions can a queue-timestamp measurement of an UPLOAD-to-DEFAULT D3D12 copy be interpreted as a raw PCIe-like H2D path?

focus: Queue timestamp timing of the copy interval itself
Architecture and heap-property queries needed for interpretation
Separating timing success from raw-PCIe eligibility
Full-copy validation outside the timing interval

comparisons.ja: COPY queue timestamp 成功と raw_pcie_h2d_eligible の差
comparisons.en: Difference between successful COPY-queue timestamp timing and raw_pcie_h2d_eligible

comparisons.ja: UMA / non-UMA と GetCustomHeapProperties の組み合わせによる解釈の差
comparisons.en: Interpretation differences caused by UMA/non-UMA and GetCustomHeapProperties

considerations.ja: この bench が測っているのは queue timestamp で囲んだ UPLOAD -> DEFAULT copy 区間です。
considerations.en: This benchmark measures the UPLOAD-to-DEFAULT copy interval bracketed by queue timestamps.

considerations.ja: この bench は raw PCIe 帯域そのもの、compute を含む end-to-end 時間、4B readback proxy を測っていません。
considerations.en: This benchmark does not measure raw PCIe bandwidth itself, end-to-end time including compute, or a 4-byte readback proxy.

considerations.ja: UMA の場合は UPLOAD と DEFAULT が同じ L0 系メモリに対応しうるため、raw PCIe H2D と呼べません。
considerations.en: If UMA is true, UPLOAD and DEFAULT can map to the same L0-class memory, so the path must not be labeled raw PCIe H2D.

considerations.ja: non-UMA でも heap 名だけでは不十分で、GetCustomHeapProperties で UPLOAD=L0+WRITE_COMBINE、DEFAULT=L1+NOT_AVAILABLE を確認してから解釈する必要があります。
considerations.en: Even on non-UMA systems, heap names alone are insufficient; use GetCustomHeapProperties to confirm UPLOAD=L0+WRITE_COMBINE and DEFAULT=L1+NOT_AVAILABLE before interpreting the path.

considerations.ja: accepted は timing + validation の技術的成功のみを表し、raw_pcie_h2d_eligible は物理解釈の妥当性を表します。
considerations.en: accepted represents only technical timing+validation success, while raw_pcie_h2d_eligible represents whether the path is physically consistent with a raw-PCIe-like interpretation.

summary.ja: latest.json を参照してください。COPY queue timestamp が使え、かつ heap/architecture 条件も満たす場合にのみ raw PCIe H2D-like と解釈します。
summary.en: See results/latest.json. The result is interpreted as raw-PCIe-like only when COPY queue timestamps are available and the heap/architecture conditions also match.
